title: Add codespell support
body:
Check codespell on each PR in make validate.

Add fixes for issues found with codespell.

Signed-off-by: Daniel J Walsh <dwalsh@redhat.com>

comments.body:
@vrothberg @QiWang19 @nalind PTAL
I am no longer blocking on codespell, because of travis.  codespell on the ubuntu versions in there is way out of date. Maybe if we convert validate tests to cirrus we can start gating on codespell.
